item.title: APT29 abuses CVE-2024-12345 in Exchange
item.description: APT29 was observed exploiting CVE-2024-12345 in Microsoft Exchange Server 2019 to target European diplomats.

item.title: Lazarus deploys new malware against fintech firms
item.description: The Lazarus Group was attributed to attacks against South Korean fintech companies using a new strain of malware.
